17.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

17.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
17.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

17.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
17.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
17.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

17.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
17.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

17.gl: properly, to pull up, especially the tent-pins, i.e. start on ajourney
17.kj: cause to blow, bring, get, (make to) go (away, forth, forward, onward, out), (take) journey, march, remove, set aside (forward), [idiom] still, be on his (go their) way.

18.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
18.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
18.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

18.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
18.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

18.gl: properly, to incline; by implication, to decline (of the slanting rays of evening); specifically, to pitch atent; gen. to encamp (for abode or siege)
18.kj: abide (in tents), camp, dwell, encamp, grow to an end, lie, pitch (tent), rest in tent.

18.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
18.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
18.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

18.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
18.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
18.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

18.gl: Paddan or Paddan-Aram, a region of Syria
18.dv: from an unused root meaning to extend; a plateau; or פַּדַּן אֲרָם; from the same and H758 (אֲרָם); the table-land of Aram;

19.gl: a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.),
19.kj: ([phrase] be) able, [idiom] about, [phrase] armholes, at, axletree, because of, beside, border, [idiom] bounty, [phrase] broad, (broken-) handed, [idiom] by, charge, coast, [phrase
19.dv: a primitive word; in distinction from H3709 (כַּף), the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally a

19.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
19.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

19.gl: to stretch or spread out; by implication, to bend away (including moral deflection); used in a great variety of application
19.kj: [phrase] afternoon, apply, bow (down, -ing), carry aside, decline, deliver, extend, go down, be gone, incline, intend, lay, let down, offer, outstretched, overthrown, pervert, pitc

19.gl: to erect, i.e. create; by extension, to procure, especially by purchase (causatively, sell); by implication to own
19.kj: attain, buy(-er), teach to keep cattle, get, provoke to jealousy, possess(-or), purchase, recover, redeem, [idiom] surely, [idiom] verily.

19.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
19.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
19.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

19.gl: properly, smoothness; figuratively, flattery; also an allotment
19.kj: field, flattering(-ry), ground, parcel, part, piece of land (ground), plat, portion, slippery place, smooth (thing).

20.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
20.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
20.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

20.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
20.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

20.gl: to station, in various applications (literally or figuratively)
20.kj: appointed, deputy, erect, establish, [idiom] Huzzah (by mistake for a proper name), lay, officer, pillar, present, rear up, set (over, up), settle, sharpen, establish, (make to) st

20.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
20.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
20.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

20.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
20.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

20.gl: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
20.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;
